title: Healthy Workplace Happier Employees
subtitle: A 1-day HRD Corp-claimable safety programme for strengthening awareness and practice in healthy workplace happier employees.
whyThisMatters: Healthy Workplace Happier Employees helps workplace teams recognize hazards, apply controls, and make healthy workplace happier employees part of everyday operations. Participants explore Practice smart snacking, Time saver habit: meal planning and how to go about it, and Topic 3 - Tips for Planning & Preparing Healthy Meals so safety expectations become easier to understand, discuss, and act on.
builtFor: Employees in operational, site-based, or technical roles
Supervisors responsible for daily safety practices
Teams that need stronger safety awareness and prevention habits
walkAwayWith: Recognize relevant workplace hazards and risk factors earlier.
Apply safer work practices and basic control measures.
Understand individual responsibility in safety, health, or environmental performance.
Support better reporting, prevention, and follow-through at work.

modules.title: Time saver habit: meal planning and how to go about it
Topic 3 - Tips for Planning & Preparing Healthy Meals

methodologyCaption: The workshop uses workplace examples, discussion, and practical hazard-recognition activities to make safe behavior concrete.
